name: file-download-with-logging
description: Authenticated download endpoint that streams catalog files and records every download in the DB. Path-traversal protection. Sets correct MIME types and RFC-5987 Content-Disposition for non-ASCII filenames.

envVars.name: DATA_DIR
envVars.description: Where the SQLite file lives. Default: ./data

postInstall: 1. The downloads schema auto-initializes on first call to recordDownload()
2. Run db/migrations/002_downloads.sql manually if you prefer explicit migrations
3. To make downloads public, remove the getServerSession check at the top of route.ts
